compounds.frequency: 2x daily, then reduce to once daily

benefits.description: Notices significant improvements when using full sequence 43aa TB4, finds fragment less effective

protocol_notes: Recommends local injection as close to injury site as possible. Emphasizes importance of full sequence TB4 (43aa) over TB-500 fragment for efficacy. Advises continuing 500mcg twice daily until noticing changes, then reduce to once daily.
